Fucking Charlie

photos caps

(5.0/5.0 Avg rating)

Added: June 17, 2026 | Video Length: 31:54 Minutes | Photos: 29 Photos
Featuring:
  • Charlie
  • Cody

description:

Charlie's proven himself to be quite the top stud since arriving at CF, but he's no one trick pony! Charlie can take it just as good as he gives it! Or, at least, that's what he was going to prove to us as we paired him up with Cody to see just how well Charlie took to having a big, buff, muscle stud taking charge of him!

Of all the things for these two to bond over, it was bowling. They were hanging out and chatting about bowling around the studio, really having fun with it and having fun meeting and getting to know a fellow fan. We'll have to take them out bowling together sometime!

Until then, it's a different type of balls and another kind of split we're interested in seeing these two bond over (... ok those are some awful puns but it's not often I have to make a bowling reference in these writeups!).

Thankfully for all of us, their shared interests aren't limited to the lanes - these guys have plenty in common when it comes to what they enjoy in the bedroom. It had been a long time since Charlie had bottomed at all until this episode, but Cody was more than happy to ease him back into things. Indeed, he does a masterful job of that and we can tell that's the case with how Charlie reacts and responds to having Cody inside him. As an added bonus for all of us, rimming is something both of these guys love and something both of them do plenty of here! Most of all, though, this is about Charlie giving his hole up for the first time in a long time, and to a buff muscle stud who takes charge of him and gives Charlie what he'd been waiting too long for!
